2604.10297.title: FashionMV: Product-Level Composed Image Retrieval with Multi-View Fashion Data
2604.10297.paper_summary: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) retrieves target images using a reference image paired with modification text. Despite rapid advances, all existing methods and datasets operate at the image level -- a single reference image plus modification text in, a single target image out -- while real e-commerce users reason about products shown from multiple viewpoints. We term this mismatch View Incompleteness and formally define a new Multi-View CIR task that generalizes standard CIR from image-level to product-level retrieval. To support this task, we construct FashionMV, the first large-scale multi-view fashion dataset for product-level CIR, comprising 127K products, 472K multi-view images, and over 220K CIR triplets, built through a fully automated pipeline leveraging large multimodal models. We further propose ProCIR (Product-level Composed Image Retrieval), a modeling framework built upon a multimodal large language model that employs three complementary mechanisms -- two-stage dialogue, caption-based alignment, and chain-of-thought guidance -- together with an optional supervised fine-tuning (SFT) stage that injects structured product knowledge prior to contrastive training. Systematic ablation across 16 configurations on three fashion benchmarks reveals that: (1) alignment is the single most critical mechanism; (2) the two-stage dialogue architecture is a prerequisite for effective alignment; and (3) SFT and chain-of-thought serve as partially redundant knowledge injection paths. Our best 0.8B-parameter model outperforms all baselines, including general-purpose embedding models 10x its size. The dataset, model, and code are publicly available at https://github.com/yuandaxia2001/FashionMV.
2604.10297.paper_summary_zh: 組合圖像檢索（CIR）使用配對的參考圖像和修改文本來檢索目標圖像。儘管快速進步，所有現有的方法和數據集都在圖像層面運作——一個參考圖像加上修改文本輸入，一個目標圖像輸出——而真實的電子商務用戶則從多個視角推理顯示的產品。我們將這種不匹配稱為視圖不完整性，並正式定義一個新的多視圖CIR任務，將標準CIR從圖像層面推廣到產品層面檢索。為了支持這一任務，我們構建了FashionMV，第一個大規模多視圖時尚數據集，用於產品層面CIR，包含127K個產品、472K個多視圖圖像和超過220K個CIR三元組，通過一個完全自動化的管道構建，利用大型多模態模型。我們進一步提出ProCIR（產品層面組合圖像檢索），這是一個基於多模態大型語言模型的建模框架，採用三種互補機制——兩階段對話、基於標題的對齊和思維鏈指導——以及一個可選的監督微調（SFT）階段，該階段在對比訓練之前注入結構化的產品知識。在三個時尚基準上進行的16個配置的系統性消融研究顯示：（1）對齊是最關鍵的單一機制；（2）兩階段對話架構是有效對齊的前提；（3）SFT和思維鏈作為部分冗餘的知識注入路徑。我們最佳的0.8B參數模型超越了所有基準，包括其大小的10倍的通用嵌入模型。數據集、模型和代碼可在https://github.com/yuandaxia2001/FashionMV公開獲得。
2604.10297.author: Peng Yuan et.al.
2604.10297.authors: Peng Yuan, Bingyin Mei, Hui Zhang
